sourceEvent.title: Build With AI
sourceEvent.description: Build your first AI agent from scratch - guided walkthrough, live demo, and hands-on coding session with mentor support.

hosts.mentor_bio: Data Analyst | Data Science | Mentor
hosts.mentor_description: Harshvardhan Singh is a dedicated Data Science and Data Analysis mentor who has trained 2000+ students. He specializes in foundational and advanced topics like Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and LLMs. His teaching covers essential skills such as data wrangling, exploratory data analysis, statistical modeling, and data visualization using tools like Python, SQL, and Excel. Harshvardhan also delves into predictive modeling, feature engineering, and deploying machine learning models to solve real-world problems. Passionate about empowering learners, he ensures students gain hands-on experience in tackling data-driven challenges and mastering cutting-edge technologies.

rawPayload.title: Should you study abroad in 2025? Complete step-by-step guide for students!
rawPayload.description: Webinar by QS, In parternship with GeeksforGeeks
rawPayload.listingText: Should you study abroad in 2025? Complete step-by-step guide for students!

sourceEvent.title: Should you study abroad in 2025? Complete step-by-step guide for students!
sourceEvent.overview: Webinar by QS, In parternship with GeeksforGeeks
sourceEvent.description:
QS- Quacquarelli Symonds is the world’s leading provider of insights, analytics and services to the global higher education sector. Across their 30-year history, QS has built close relationships with over 1,500 leading institutions worldwide. They’re best known for the QS World University Rankings portfolio, the flagship website TopUniversities.com, their International Student Survey and event series: The Discover master’s and Discover MBA fairs. 

At the core of the QS is the mission to help people worldwide fulfil their potential through educational achievement, international mobility, and career development. They offer a free and impartial one-to-one study abroad guidance and counselling service, through their global network of experts that you can take advantage of today. QS Applys' end-to-end study abroad guidance and counselling service includes help with:

  • Shortlisting your university options based on your profile
  • Preparation with documentation and help with application submission
  • Preparation and submission support for your student visa
  • Career prospects and employability opportunities
  • Funding and scholarship opportunities
  • Pre-departure and pre-arrival support
  • Applying to 5+ universities in a single click
  • Sharing universities options with no GRE/GMAT
  • Quick offer letters & generous scholarships
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
In this free webinar we will be discussing on topics such as:

  • Top Courses to Study Abroad in 2025: See what's trending and plan your career path.
  • Benefits of Studying Abroad: Gain access to world-class education and faculty.
  • Maximizing ROI: Get the most out of your investment in education.
  • Top Study Destinations for 2025: Know the popular countries for international students.
  • How to Choose the Right Program and University: How QS can help students make informed decisions.
  • Financial Planning and Scholarships: Estimating the cost of studying abroad (tuition, living expenses, etc.)
  • Application Process Step-by-Step: Applications, processes, tests & more.
  • Visa and Immigration Processes: Navigating visa applications and ensuring compliance.
  • Life Abroad as an International Student: Adjusting to a new culture and managing homesickness.
  • Post-Graduation Opportunities: What lies ahead for you!

Recommended for: If you are a student in 3rd/final year of your graduation and/or if you are pursuing any tech related degree or program.

rawPayload.title: Zero to AI Tester: Building End-to-End Automation with KaneAI
rawPayload.description: Zero to AI Tester: Building End-to-End Automation with KaneAI
rawPayload.listingText: Zero to AI Tester: Building End-to-End Automation with KaneAI

sourceEvent.title: Zero to AI Tester: Building End-to-End Automation with KaneAI
sourceEvent.overview: Zero to AI Tester: Building End-to-End Automation with KaneAI
sourceEvent.description:
Watch the video below to Get Hands-on with KaneAI:

This hands-on workshop introduces participants to the future of software testing using KaneAI by TestMu AI (formerly LambdaTest). Designed for aspiring QA professionals, the session demonstrates how AI can transform a simple requirement into a fully automated, executable test flow without writing complex scripts.

Participants will learn how to move seamlessly from requirement -> natural language -> automation code -> execution -> report, all powered by an AI agent. Through a live demo of a login-to-checkout journey across browsers, attendees will understand how AI-driven testing works in real-world scenarios and how to think in terms of test intents and user journeys rather than scripts and locators.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
• Converting requirements into natural language test intents
  • Generating automation code using AI
  • Executing end-to-end tests across multiple browsers
  • Understanding AI-driven reporting and failure analysis
  • Adopting an industry-ready, AI-first automation mindset
  • Building practical, employable skills for QA and automation roles

BONUS Reward: Get Participation Certificate for registering and attending this Free Workshop!

hosts.mentor_bio: Project Manager @GeeksforGeeks

rawPayload.title: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
rawPayload.description: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
rawPayload.listingText: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex

sourceEvent.title: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.overview: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.description:
JOIN HERE | LIVE [Dec 18]

Important: This is the last workshop of the series. The registered users will get their certificate of participation after this workshop. You can attend the first 2 sessions on our Youtube Channel.

Watch the video below to Get Hands-on with UiPath


As we move deeper into the era of intelligent automation, the UiPath Platform™ is empowering people, robots, AI models, and autonomous agents to collaborate seamlessly — transforming the way enterprises operate and unlocking new levels of human potential.

AI agents are self-directed software systems capable of perceiving their environment, reasoning toward specific goals, and executing multi-step workflows with minimal human oversight. Powered by large language models (LLMs), these agents are reshaping how organizations function — enabling adaptive, scalable processes that accelerate decision-making, productivity, and innovation.

In this session, you’ll discover how to design, integrate, and deploy enterprise-grade Coded Agents on the UiPath platform, leveraging the LlamaIndex Framework to build high-accuracy, context-aware automation.

“Through this integration, developers can combine LlamaIndex + LlamaCloud to create deeply customized agents over proprietary data, and then extend them into UiPath’s governed workflows — gaining observability, compliance, and pro-developer flexibility.”
— Jerry Liu, CEO, LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
1. Understand the enterprise benefits of UiPath Coded Agents.

  2. Wrap a LlamaIndex agent as a UiPath Coded Agent.

  3. Bind Context Grounding indexes through Orchestrator.

  4. Publish, monitor, and evaluate the agent with governed telemetry.

  5. Orchestrate the agent both in Orchestrator and in a larger Maestro flow.

GET CERTIFICATION: Register for this event, attend all 3 Workshops, and get a Pariticipation Certificate!

hosts.mentor_description:
A distinguished Data Scientist, Sampurn has over 10 years of experience exclusively working on Data Science and AI. His primary focus has been shaping the BFSI landscape. With an extraordinary track record as a Data Science - Solution Architect, Sampurn has experience in creating end-to-end AI solutions by assessing business processes, collaborating with stakeholders, and crafting efficient model architectures.

Not just BFSI, Sampurn has, also, worked in various domains like Energy Management, Healthcare, Edtech, and has even worked with the Ministry of Defence to integrate AI in the nation's security. In recent times, Sampurn's paramount achievement has been creating virtual workers using multi-agentic frameworks for a large insurance organization. Currently, he is leading the Data Science Practice within GeeksForGeeks helping optimize various processes by creating in-house solutions. His primary role is as a mentor to guide students and working professionals in their Data Science journey.

rawPayload.title: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
rawPayload.description: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
rawPayload.listingText: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot

sourceEvent.title: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
sourceEvent.overview: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
sourceEvent.description:
Ready to move beyond simple code suggestions? This session dives into the advanced, agentic capabilities of GitHub Copilot that let you delegate tasks to AI agents and orchestrate them to get work done. You’ll see how Copilot Agent Mode and Coding Agent can automate multi-step tasks, debug issues, and iterate on solutions - so you can focus on directing the workflow instead of doing everything manually.

We’ll also explore how to ground Copilot’s responses with context using Copilot Spaces, making AI assistance more accurate and project-aware. Finally, get a preview of GitHub Spark, where you’ll see how to prototype entire applications using just natural language. This is a hands-on, developer-focused session packed with practical demos and real-world workflows.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
1. Automate repetitive coding tasks and handle complex workflows with Copilot Agent Mode and Coding Agent.
  2. Debug and fix issues faster using self-healing and iterative capabilities.
  3. Improve AI accuracy by grounding responses with project context through Copilot Spaces.
  4. Prototype applications from scratch using natural language with GitHub Spark.
  5. Adopt best practices for integrating these tools into your development workflow.

rawPayload.title: Nation SkillUp Workshops - Noida
rawPayload.description: Join us for an exciting series of hands-on, skill-focused workshops at the GeeksforGeeks Noida Center! Every Wednesday, we bring you a new theme — from building real-world projects to mastering interview skills — designed to give you practical, job-ready experience. Each session is beginner-friendly yet impactful, and you’ll leave with something tangible to showcase in your portfolio.
rawPayload.listingText: Nation SkillUp Workshops - Noida

sourceEvent.title: Nation SkillUp Workshops - Noida
sourceEvent.overview: Join us for an exciting series of hands-on, skill-focused workshops at the GeeksforGeeks Noida Center! Every Wednesday, we bring you a new theme — from building real-world projects to mastering interview skills — designed to give you practical, job-ready experience. Each session is beginner-friendly yet impactful, and you’ll leave with something tangible to showcase in your portfolio.
sourceEvent.description:
The GeeksforGeeks Noida Workshop Series is part of our Nation SkillUp initiative, aimed at helping students and professionals enhance their tech skills in a practical, engaging way. Over five consecutive weeks, you will work on real-world projects, guided by industry experts, and gain valuable insights into the latest tools and technologies.

  • When: Every Wednesday | Slot confirmation will be shared with you on WhatsApp/Mail, Entry will be permitted only upon showing the slot confirmation invitation.

  • Where: GeeksforGeeks Noida Center

  • Format: Hands-on workshop + Project completion + Expert guidance

  • Bonus Rewards: Certificate of Participation for all + GfG T-Shirt Rewards for selected learners based on in-class activity

Noida Workshop Calendar:

  1. Sep 10 – DSA for Interviews

  2. Sep 17 – Launch Your First REST API with Spring Boot

  3. Sep 24 – Build Your First Predictive Model in 90 Minutes
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
By attending the Noida workshop series, you will:

  • Gain hands-on experience in data visualization, web development, backend APIs, machine learning, and problem-solving.

  • Understand end-to-end project building — from concept to deployment.

  • Practice coding and optimization for real interview-style problems.

  • Get exposure to industry-standard tools & technologies (HTML, CSS, Spring Boot, React, Python, etc.).

  • Build 5 portfolio-worthy projects to boost your career prospects.


Check out our full range of Offline Center Courses available at this location!

location_details.address: A-143, 6th & 7th Floor, Sovereign Corporate Tower, Sector-136, Noida, Uttar Pradesh - 201305
